subtitle: A half-mile of fine sand off a residential loop on Oahu's windward side, named in 1924 by a developer and now losing itself to the seawalls built to save the houses behind it.
spike_statement: Dr. Beach named it America's best in 1996, then warned its seawalls would erase it; the western end already has.

levers.photo_tone: soft windward morning light, twin islets offshore
